name: SiGMA: Sign-Guided Merging and Adaptation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
summary: arXiv:2607.20511v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) is crucial for adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to evolving a sequence of downstream...
description: arXiv:2607.20511v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) is crucial for adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to evolving a sequence of downstream tasks. Prior methods mostly utilize Mixture of Experts or expansion merge approach, primarily focusing on catastrophic forgetting, yet they still suffer from negative interference during inference, wh...
author: Keonhee Park, Gunhee Kim
